FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.Category.De: Member reordering and brace style that mirror the FreeCRM house layout. Standard formatting stays owned by .editorconfig; these settings cover only what it can't express.
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.SortAlphabe: Sort members alphabetically within each kind group (properties, indexers and methods are interleaved into one alphabetical list).
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.IgnoreLeadi: When comparing names, ignore a single leading underscore so _connectionString sorts as "connectionString".
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.GroupByVisi: Group members by accessibility (public first) before sorting alphabetically. Off by default — FreeCRM interleaves public/private in pure alphabetical order.
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.StaticMembe: Within a kind group, place static members before instance members. Off by default to match FreeCRM (purely alphabetical).
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.CollapseWra: When a parameter list is already wrapped across multiple lines, reformat it into the FreeCRM hand style: the name alone on its line, '(' alone, each parameter one level deeper, and the closing ')' glued to the body's '{' as "){". If the whole signature would instead fit within Max line width, it collapses back onto a single line. Single-line declarations are never force-wrapped.
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.IndentWrapp: When a Razor/Blazor element's attributes are already wrapped across lines, line up each continuation attribute at the element's indent plus two levels ("double tab"), keeping them visually deeper than the child body. Only leading whitespace inside the start tag changes, so rendered output is preserved. Tags that would fit within Max line width collapse onto one line.
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.RespectRegi: Leave any type whose only directives are #region / #endregion completely untouched, so regions and the members inside them keep their layout. Turn off to allow members to be reordered across region boundaries (a re-parse safety net still blocks anything that would unbalance the region pairing).
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.MaxPercentR: If sorting would move more than this percent (0..100) of a type's sortable members, the type is treated as deliberately ordered by purpose and left untouched. Set 100 to always sort.
FreeCodeReorganizer.Settings.MaxLineWidt: The line width (characters) at or under which an already-wrapped parameter list or Razor start tag is collapsed back onto a single line instead of being kept multi-line. Wider ones stay wrapped. Never force-wraps a single-line declaration. Default 120.
